revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-3-365

A gas, CO2, that can be readily compressed for storage at high pressure. It is sometimes used to provide the power to operate a fog signal bell.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Carbon dioxide}}
